title: × trisetopsotrichon altius
intro: × Trisetopsotrichon altius is a hybrid species of grass, resulting from the cross between Trisetum flavescens and Psammothamnus supinus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of × Trisetopsotrichon altius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, while also showing promise in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of × Trisetopsotrichon altius typically involve drying the plant material and then infusing it in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
